code: export class SlotMachineModuleParser{constructor(){this._hasInfo=false;this._minBet=0;this._maxBet=0;}flush(){this._hasInfo=false;this._minBet=0;this._maxBet=0;return true;}parse(wrapper){if(!wrapper)return false;this._hasInfo=wrapper.readBoolean();this._minBet=wrapper.readInt();this._maxBet=wrapper.readInt();return true;}get hasInfo(){return this._hasInfo;}get minBet(){return this._minBet;}get maxBet(){return this._maxBet;}}
